payload.topic: I wrote this: 'The city planted more trees and solved heat risk.' Can you tell me whether the source actually backs that up, and where my claim might be going t
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, instead of copying from the source, I can help with an outline you can turn into your own answer.

The source indicates that tree canopy coverage increased but does not explicitly state that planting more trees alone solved all local heat risks. It mentions improvements due to municipal grants, volunteer groups, and a requirement for replacement plantings after street re

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
